requirement_topic.en: Safety and Desert Environmental Suitability — IEC 62109, Turkmenstandartlary Conformity, Heat and Dust Derating
requirement_topic.zh: 安全与沙漠环境适用性——IEC 62109、Turkmenstandartlary合格评定、高温和粉尘降额
requirement_topic.zht: 安全與沙漠環境適用性——IEC 62109、Turkmenstandartlary合格評定、高溫和粉塵降額

summary.en: PV inverter safety and market-access planning for Turkmenistan should be built around domestic Turkmenstandartlary conformity assessment and IEC-aligned safety evidence. IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the core international safety standards for power converters and PV inverters. Publicly confirmed Turkmenistan solar-inverter product regulations and designated conformity bodies have not been fully confirmed in this dataset, so exporters should verify the applicable Turkmenstandartlary route, local representative or importer obligations, customs documentation, labelling, language, and project-owner requirements before shipment. Because Turkmenistan has extreme desert heat and dust exposure and solar deployment is still nascent, project files should include thermal derating curves, high-ambient operation limits, ingress protection, dust filtration or enclosure design, surge protection, service access, and installation clearance evidence.
summary.zh: 土库曼斯坦光伏逆变器安全和市场准入规划应围绕国内Turkmenstandartlary合格评定和IEC对齐安全证据建立。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是功率变换器和光伏逆变器的核心国际安全标准。本数据集中尚未完全确认土库曼斯坦公开的太阳能逆变器产品法规和指定合格评定机构，因此出口商应在出货前核实适用的Turkmenstandartlary路径、当地代表或进口商义务、海关文件、标签、语言和项目业主要求。由于土库曼斯坦存在极端沙漠高温和粉尘暴露，且太阳能部署仍处于起步阶段，项目文件应包括热降额曲线、高环境温度运行限值、防护等级、粉尘过滤或外壳设计、浪涌保护、维护通道和安装间距证据。
summary.zht: 土庫曼斯坦光伏逆變器安全和市場准入規劃應圍繞國內Turkmenstandartlary合格評定和IEC對齊安全證據建立。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是功率轉換器和光伏逆變器的核心國際安全標準。本數據集中尚未完全確認土庫曼斯坦公開的太陽能逆變器產品法規和指定合格評定機構，因此出口商應在出貨前核實適用的Turkmenstandartlary路徑、當地代表或進口商義務、海關文件、標籤、語言和項目業主要求。由於土庫曼斯坦存在極端沙漠高溫和粉塵暴露，且太陽能部署仍處於起步階段，項目文件應包括熱降額曲線、高環境溫度運行限值、防護等級、粉塵過濾或外殼設計、突波保護、維護通道和安裝間距證據。

standards_or_laws: Turkmenstandartlary domestic conformity assessment for regulated products where applicable
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Project-specific desert heat, dust, ingress-protection, surge-protection, and thermal-derating requirements
Turkmenistan is not an EAEU member — EAC / TR CU certification is not the applicable market-access route

summary.en: China evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, factory quality files, CQC or CGC voluntary certificates, and CNAS laboratory reports. These files can support a Turkmenistan technical dossier, but they are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence or for Turkmenstandartlary conformity where applicable. Chinese standard operation and factory derating data may not fully cover Turkmenistan desert dust, high ambient temperature, solar irradiance, and maintenance constraints unless separately tested or documented.
summary.zh: 中国证据通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、工厂质量文件、CQC或CGC自愿性证书，以及CNAS实验室报告。这些文件可支持土库曼斯坦技术档案，但不能自动替代IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，也不能在适用时自动替代Turkmenstandartlary合格评定。除非另行测试或记录，中国标准运行条件和工厂降额数据未必完全覆盖土库曼斯坦沙漠粉尘、高环境温度、太阳辐照和维护限制。
summary.zht: 中國證據通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、工廠品質文件、CQC或CGC自願性證書，以及CNAS實驗室報告。這些文件可支持土庫曼斯坦技術檔案，但不能自動替代IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，也不能在適用時自動替代Turkmenstandartlary合格評定。除非另行測試或記錄，中國標準運行條件和工廠降額數據未必完全覆蓋土庫曼斯坦沙漠粉塵、高環境溫度、太陽輻照和維護限制。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
CQC / CGC voluntary China PV inverter certification schemes where obtained

gap.en: Gap: A China-only safety dossier should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 reports, Turkmenstandartlary conformity documents where applicable, and a desert-environment suitability file. Include high-temperature operating range, thermal derating curves, enclosure ingress protection against dust, heat-sink and ventilation assumptions, surge-protection coordination, corrosion and UV exposure assumptions, installation clearances, maintenance intervals, and firmware or shutdown behaviour at high ambient temperatures. Confirm the applicable Turkmenstandartlary body, local importer obligations, and any project-owner safety specifications directly because publicly available PV-specific rules are limited.
gap.zh: 差距：仅含中国安全证据的档案应补充IEC 62109-1/-2报告、适用时的Turkmenstandartlary合格评定文件，以及沙漠环境适用性文件。应包括高温运行范围、热降额曲线、外壳防尘等级、散热器和通风假设、浪涌保护配合、腐蚀和紫外暴露假设、安装间距、维护周期，以及高环境温度下的固件或停机行为。由于公开的光伏专属规则有限，应直接确认适用的Turkmenstandartlary机构、当地进口商义务和任何项目业主安全规格。
gap.zht: 差距：僅含中國安全證據的檔案應補充IEC 62109-1/-2報告、適用時的Turkmenstandartlary合格評定文件，以及沙漠環境適用性文件。應包括高溫運行範圍、熱降額曲線、外殼防塵等級、散熱器和通風假設、突波保護配合、腐蝕和紫外暴露假設、安裝間距、維護週期，以及高環境溫度下的韌體或停機行為。由於公開的光伏專屬規則有限，應直接確認適用的Turkmenstandartlary機構、當地進口商義務和任何項目業主安全規格。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Turkmenstandartlary conformity, Turkmenenergo project review, procurement specifications, insurer requirements, or project-owner requirements call for IEC 62109 and desert-environment suitability evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T and NB/T evidence may support China domestic conformity or voluntary certification but does not automatically satisfy Turkmenistan IEC and project environmental requirements

source.publisher: Turkmenstandartlary (Main State Service for Standardisation, Metrology and State Supervision)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China-only GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 safety evidence for Turkmenistan PV inverter acceptance. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence, verify the domestic Turkmenstandartlary conformity route, and add desert heat and dust derating documentation for the exact installation environment. EAC / TR CU certification is not the applicable route because Turkmenistan is not an EAEU member.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅依赖中国GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全证据来满足土库曼斯坦光伏逆变器验收。应准备IEC 62109-1/-2证据，核实国内Turkmenstandartlary合格评定路径，并针对具体安装环境补充沙漠高温和粉尘降额文件。EAC / TR CU认证不是适用途径，因为土库曼斯坦不是EAEU成员。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅依賴中國GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全證據來滿足土庫曼斯坦光伏逆變器驗收。應準備IEC 62109-1/-2證據，核實國內Turkmenstandartlary合格評定路徑，並針對具體安裝環境補充沙漠高溫和粉塵降額文件。EAC / TR CU認證不是適用途徑，因為土庫曼斯坦不是EAEU成員。
